chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : ما من مؤمن يخذل أخاه وهو يقدر على نصرته، إلا خذله الله عز وجل في الدنيا والآخرة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 178. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Any believer that disappoints his brother while he is able to help him, Allah will desert him in the world and the hereafter.
